title: StoneyCore
description: A library used for Knights & Heraldry team mods.
body:
The library is in beta, feel free to join our discord and give us your feedback.

StoneyCore is a library that aims to streamline coding for feature updates and mods for Knights & Heraldry team mods. Currently, it simplifies developing mods focused solely on the mechanics introduced by Knights and Heraldry, it will be expanded in the future.
